title: Fractions & Decimals
subject: Mathematics
learning_objectives: Classify proper, improper, and mixed fractions.
Convert fractions to decimals and percentages.
Formulate solutions to commercial share ratio problems.

key_vocabulary.definition: The top number in a fraction representing parts possessed.
The bottom number representing the total parts in the whole.
The multiplicative inverse of a fraction (e.g. 2/3 reciprocal is 3/2).

content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Fractions & Decimals
Fractions represent numerical segments of a whole entity. To add or subtract fractions with unlike denominators, we must compute the Least Common Multiple (LCM).
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: Simplify: 2/3 + 1/4
content.explanation: LCM of 3 and 4 is 12. 2/3 becomes 8/12, and 1/4 becomes 3/12. 8/12 + 3/12 = 11/12.

questions.question: Which of these is an improper fraction?
What is the product of 5/6 and 3/5?
